landing.heroTitle: The marketing team you never had.
landing.heroSubtitle: Free AI tools to understand your customers and write your marketing — no agency, no experience needed.
landing.toolsSubtitle: Know who to talk to. Know what to say.
landing.segmentDesc: Find out who actually walks through your door — and what each group needs from you.
landing.campaignDesc: Generate a complete, ready-to-post marketing campaign in under a minute.
landing.step1Desc: Choose to understand your customers or write a campaign. No setup, no login.
landing.step2Desc: Tell the AI about your business in plain English. Takes about 60 seconds.
landing.step3Desc: Real insights and ready-to-use content — copy, paste, post. Done.
landing.builtFor: Built for the business owner doing everything themselves
landing.bottomCtaDesc: Thousands of small business owners are finding their best customers and writing better marketing with AI4SMB. It's free, it's fast, and it takes less than two minutes.
landing.footerDesc: Free AI marketing tools for small businesses.
landing.testimonialEmpty: Be the first to share your experience!

segment.pageSubtitle: Choose how you want to analyze your customer base
segment.askDesc: Answer a few quick questions about your business — or see instant benchmarks for your industry.
segment.dataDesc: Upload a spreadsheet or paste sales data from Square, Clover, Toast, or any POS system.
segment.textDesc: Paste your Google, Yelp, or social media content to understand who's talking about you.
segment.guideMe: Not sure? Let our AI guide you
segment.privacyNote: Your data stays private. Any files or text you provide are processed in your browser or anonymized before analysis. Nothing is stored.

generate.customPlaceholder: Describe your business in a few words...
generate.step2Subtitle: Pick a goal, then hit create
generate.addDetails: + Any details you'd like to add? (optional)
generate.detailsPlaceholder: e.g. We're open late on Fridays, our specialty is gluten-free
generate.goalDesc_new_customers: Bring in new foot traffic or online visitors
generate.goalDesc_promotion: Limited-time offer, grand opening, holiday special
generate.goalDesc_retention: Re-engage people who haven't visited in a while
generate.goalDesc_launch: New product, menu item, or service
generate.goalDesc_surprise: We'll give you our best idea for your business

chat.title: AI Strategist
chat.greeting:
Hey! Tell me about your business and what you want to achieve — I'll build you a campaign.

Example: "I run a coffee shop and want more morning customers."
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

interview.customPlaceholder: Describe your business in a few words...
interview.step2Subtitle: Answer what you know — skip what you don't
interview.customerTypesLabel: Who comes in? (select all that apply)
interview.visitFreqLabel: How often do regulars come back?
interview.vipLabel: Do you have customers who spend or visit much more than average?
interview.vipPlaceholder: Describe them briefly (e.g. 'morning coffee crowd, come every weekday')
interview.discoveryLabel: How do most customers find you? (select all that apply)
interview.extraNotesLabel: Anything else you've noticed about your customers? (optional)
interview.extraNotesPlaceholder: e.g. we get lots of first dates on Fridays, parents bring kids after school, office groups order in bulk...
interview.metaLabel: Based on your knowledge of your customers

benchmark.title: Industry Benchmarks
benchmark.subtitle: Pick your business type and get typical customer segments instantly
benchmark.disclaimer: Based on industry patterns, not your specific data
benchmark.metaLabel: Based on industry benchmarks for this business type

review.thanks: Review submitted! It will appear after approval.
review.npsQuestion: How likely are you to recommend AI4SMB to a friend or colleague?
review.identityLabel: How would you like to appear?
review.consentDisplay: I agree that my review may be displayed publicly on the AI4SMB website.
